StalenessPropagationState.description: State model derived from StalenessPropagation TLA+ spec

DirectlyStale.description: Verifier for invariant DirectlyStale from StalenessPropagation spec

DirectCorrect.description: Verifier for invariant DirectCorrect from StalenessPropagation spec

MonotonicGrowth.description: Verifier for invariant MonotonicGrowth from StalenessPropagation spec

TransitiveComplete.message:
TransitiveComplete violation: phase = "complete" =>
        /\ OneHopExpand(transitive_stale) = transitive_stale
        /\ direct_stale \subseteq ...
TransitiveComplete.description: Verifier for invariant TransitiveComplete from StalenessPropagation spec

conditions:
phase = "complete" =>
        \A n \in Nodes : n \in direct_stale => n \in transitive_stale
NoFalseNegatives.message:
NoFalseNegatives violation: phase = "complete" =>
        \A n \in Nodes : n \in direct_stale => n \in transitive_stale
NoFalseNegatives.description: Verifier for invariant NoFalseNegatives from StalenessPropagation spec

conditions:
phase = "complete" =>
        \A e \in edges :
            e[2] \in transitive_stale => e[1] \in transitive_stale
AllDependentsIncluded.message:
AllDependentsIncluded violation: phase = "complete" =>
        \A e \in edges :
            e[2] \in transitive_stale => e[1] \in transitive_stale
AllDependentsIncluded.description: Verifier for invariant AllDependentsIncluded from StalenessPropagation spec

BoundedExecution.description: Verifier for invariant BoundedExecution from StalenessPropagation spec

assert_DirectlyStale.description: Test assertion for DirectlyStale from StalenessPropagation spec

assert_DirectCorrect.message: Assertion failed: DirectCorrect — phase /= "detect" => direct_stale = DirectlyStale
assert_DirectCorrect.description: Test assertion for DirectCorrect from StalenessPropagation spec

assert_MonotonicGrowth.description: Test assertion for MonotonicGrowth from StalenessPropagation spec

assert_TransitiveComplete.condition:
phase = "complete" implies
        and OneHopExpand(transitive_stale) = transitive_stale
        and direct_stale \subseteq transitive_stale
assert_TransitiveComplete.message:
Assertion failed: TransitiveComplete — phase = "complete" =>
        /\ OneHopExpand(transitive_stale) = transitive_stale
        /\ direct_stale \subseteq ...
assert_TransitiveComplete.description: Test assertion for TransitiveComplete from StalenessPropagation spec

assert_NoFalseNegatives.condition:
phase = "complete" implies
        \A n in Nodes : n in direct_stale implies n in transitive_stale
assert_NoFalseNegatives.message:
Assertion failed: NoFalseNegatives — phase = "complete" =>
        \A n \in Nodes : n \in direct_stale => n \in transitive_stale
assert_NoFalseNegatives.description: Test assertion for NoFalseNegatives from StalenessPropagation spec

assert_AllDependentsIncluded.condition:
phase = "complete" implies
        \A e in edges :
            e[2] in transitive_stale implies e[1] in transitive_stale
assert_AllDependentsIncluded.message:
Assertion failed: AllDependentsIncluded — phase = "complete" =>
        \A e \in edges :
            e[2] \in transitive_stale => e[1] \in transitive_stale
assert_AllDependentsIncluded.description: Test assertion for AllDependentsIncluded from StalenessPropagation spec

assert_BoundedExecution.description: Test assertion for BoundedExecution from StalenessPropagation spec
